title: Indian Beef Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy beef curry dish inspired by Indian cuisine. Perfect for a keto diet.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and beef broth and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for another 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over cauliflower rice or with a side of naan bread.
